parent.domain: ITSM is shifting to AI triage, predictive routing and self‑service. Competitors: ServiceNow, BMC Helix, Ivanti, Jira Service Mgmt.
parent.tech: Incident/Request/KB, Predictive Intelligence, Flow Designer, UI Policies, Client Scripts, RBAC; ITIL‑aligned processes.
parent.problem: Manual triage increases MTTR and cost; inconsistent categorization and routing.
parent.hypothesis: AI‑assisted categorization + automation will cut MTTR 30–40% and lift CSAT.
parent.prototype: Incident create → prediction → assignment → notify → SLA tracking; dashboards monitor MTTR and reassignments.

parent.domain: HRSD focuses on employee experience, guided decisions and secure handling of sensitive HR data.
parent.tech: HR Case Mgmt, Lifecycle Events, Decision Tables, Flow Designer, Encryption/RBAC, PA analytics.
parent.problem: Slow HR routing and policy inconsistency reduce employee satisfaction.
parent.hypothesis: Decision tables + automation reduce resolution time ~30%.
parent.prototype: Case create → decision route → assignment → comms → audit trail and PA KPIs.

parent.domain: ITOM centers on CMDB, discovery, service mapping and AIOps for proactive incident prevention.
parent.tech: CMDB, Discovery, Service Mapping, Event Mgmt, Health Log Analytics, Runbook Automation.
parent.problem: Blind spots and alert fatigue slow response and increase risk.
parent.hypothesis: Good CMDB + correlation + AIOps lowers noise 40–60% and speeds resolution.
parent.prototype: Discovery → CI relations → event ingest → correlation → runbook triggers → incident linkage.

parent.domain: CSM aims for deflection, omnichannel routing and entitlement‑aware SLAs.
parent.tech: Agent Workspace, AWA, Portal, KB/Search, Entitlements, SLAs.
parent.problem: High volume and long wait times reduce CSAT.
parent.hypothesis: Deflection + skills routing improves FCR and reduces handle time.
parent.prototype: Portal wizard → case only if needed → skills‑based assignment → CSAT capture.

parent.domain: GRC unifies risks, controls, policies and evidence—important for AI governance too.
parent.tech: Risk Register, Controls, Policies, Assessments, Issues, Attestations, Evidence.
parent.problem: Manual, siloed compliance and unclear ownership.
parent.hypothesis: Centralized evidence and continuous monitoring reduce audit findings.
parent.prototype: Risk KRIs → control tests → issue workflows → exportable audit packs.

parent.domain: Agentic AI uses autonomous agents with tool‑use to execute multi‑step tasks (e.g., analyze incidents, call APIs, update records).
parent.tech: LLM planning + tools (REST APIs, Scripted Actions), evaluators, guardrails, audit logging; human‑in‑the‑loop for high‑risk actions.
parent.problem: Manual cross‑system coordination slows operations and introduces errors.
parent.hypothesis: Agentic workflows will speed resolution and reduce handoffs in ITSM/ITOM/CSM scenarios.
parent.prototype: Agent plans steps → queries CMDB/KB → proposes actions → runs flows via IntegrationHub → captures evidence and metrics.
